mapper.update: UPDATE TEACH_CATEGORY_CODE SET teach_code_name = #{teach_code_name}, remark = #{remark}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, modify_date = SYSDATE, modify_id = #{modify_id} WHERE teach_code_id = #{teach_code_id} AND teach_group_id = #{teach_group_id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TEACH_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE teach_group_id = 'GROUP_DIV' AND teach_code_id != '--' ORDER BY print_seq
SELECT * FROM TEACH_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE teach_group_id = 'GROUP_DIV' AND teach_code_id = #{teach_code_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TEACH_CATEGORY_CODE ( teach_group_id, teach_code_id, teach_code_name, print_seq, add_id, modify_id ) VALUES ( 'GROUP_DIV', #{teach_code_id}, #{teach_code_name}, #{print_seq}, #{add_id}, #{modify_id} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TEACH_CATEGORY_CODE SET teach_code_name = #{teach_code_name}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, modify_date = SYSDATE, modify_id = #{modify_id} WHERE teach_code_id = #{teach_code_id} AND teach_group_id = 'GROUP_DIV'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TEACH_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE teach_code_id = '--' ORDER BY up_teach_code_id
SELECT * FROM TEACH_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE teach_code_id = '--' AND teach_group_id = #{teach_group_id}
SELECT teach_code_name, teach_code_id , print_seq, teach_group_id FROM TEACH_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE teach_group_id = #{teach_group_id} AND teach_code_id <> '--' ORDER BY print_seq
